summary: Complete testing of three new Card Ladder-inspired features: Portfolio Value Tracker, Price Alerts, and Price History Chart. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified across Dashboard, Market, and Inventory modules.
passed_tests: BACKEND - GET /api/portfolio/summary returns 200 with required fields (total_invested, total_market_value, pnl, roi, cards, snapshots)
BACKEND - GET /api/portfolio/summary cards array has required fields (id, card_name, player, purchase_price, market_value)
BACKEND - POST /api/portfolio/refresh-value/{item_id} returns 404 for non-existent item
BACKEND - POST /api/portfolio/refresh-value/{item_id} returns 200 with market_value for existing item
BACKEND - POST /api/portfolio/snapshot returns 200 with required fields (date, timestamp, total_invested, total_market_value, pnl)
BACKEND - POST /api/alerts creates new price alert with all fields
BACKEND - POST /api/alerts supports 'above' condition type
BACKEND - POST /api/alerts works with minimal required fields
BACKEND - GET /api/alerts returns list of alerts with required fields
BACKEND - DELETE /api/alerts/{alert_id} returns 404 for non-existent alert
BACKEND - DELETE /api/alerts/{alert_id} deletes alert and returns success
BACKEND - POST /api/alerts/check returns checked count and results
FRONTEND - Dashboard shows 'Sales Overview' and 'Portfolio Value' tabs with data-testid='dash-tab-overview', 'dash-tab-portfolio'
FRONTEND - Portfolio Value tab shows KPI cards: Portfolio Value, Total Invested, P&L, Avg Card Value
FRONTEND - Portfolio Value tab shows Card Values table with inventory cards
FRONTEND - Refresh All Values button exists with data-testid='refresh-portfolio-btn'
FRONTEND - Market module shows Price Alerts section with data-testid='price-alerts'
FRONTEND - Price Alerts has '+ New Alert' button with data-testid='toggle-alert-form-btn'
FRONTEND - Alert creation form has search query (data-testid='alert-input-query'), condition buttons (alert-condition-below/above), target price (alert-input-price)
FRONTEND - Create Alert button with data-testid='create-alert-btn' works and creates alerts
FRONTEND - Alerts appear in list after creation with Check Now button visible
FRONTEND - Inventory grid cards have TrendingUp chart icon on hover (data-testid='chart-item-0')
FRONTEND - Clicking chart icon opens Price History panel (data-testid='price-chart-panel')
critical_code_review_comments: Portfolio endpoints correctly calculate total_invested, total_market_value, pnl, roi from inventory items
Price alerts correctly support 'below' and 'above' condition types with target price
PriceHistoryChart component correctly fetches data from /api/market/card-value endpoint
PortfolioTracker KPIs use proper data-testid attributes for testing
MarketModule.jsx properly imports and renders PriceAlerts component between Watchlist and Monthly Performance
InventoryModule.jsx properly renders TrendingUp chart icon with data-testid on hover
seed_data_creation: Test alerts created and cleaned up during testing. Existing inventory has 4 cards.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new Card Ladder-inspired features fully tested. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/portfolio/summary, /api/portfolio/refresh-value/{id}, /api/portfolio/snapshot, POST/GET/DELETE /api/alerts, /api/alerts/check. Key data-testid values: dash-tab-overview, dash-tab-portfolio, portfolio-tracker, portfolio-portfolio-value, portfolio-total-invested, portfolio-p&l, portfolio-avg-card-value, refresh-portfolio-btn, portfolio-card-0, price-alerts, toggle-alert-form-btn, alert-input-query, alert-condition-below, alert-condition-above, alert-input-price, create-alert-btn, check-alerts-btn, alert-item-0, chart-item-0, price-chart-panel.

features_verified.dashboard_tabs: PASS - Sales Overview and Portfolio Value tabs visible and clickable
features_verified.portfolio_kpi_cards: PASS - Portfolio Value ($15.00), Total Invested ($10.00), P&L (+$5.00), Avg Card Value ($15.00)
features_verified.portfolio_card_values_table: PASS - Shows inventory cards with market values
features_verified.refresh_all_values_button: PASS - Button visible with Zap icon
features_verified.portfolio_summary_api: PASS - Returns total_invested, total_market_value, pnl, roi, cards array
features_verified.portfolio_refresh_value_api: PASS - Refreshes single card market value
features_verified.portfolio_snapshot_api: PASS - Saves daily snapshot for trend tracking
features_verified.price_alerts_section_visible: PASS - Section appears in Market module
features_verified.alert_form_fields: PASS - Search query, condition (below/above), target price fields present
features_verified.create_alert_api: PASS - Creates alerts with all fields
features_verified.check_alerts_api: PASS - Checks all active alerts against market prices
features_verified.inventory_chart_icon_grid: PASS - TrendingUp icon appears on hover in grid view
features_verified.price_history_panel: PASS - Opens below grid showing card name and chart area
